controls: immutable O1C-0011 template, semantic map, manifest and native dependency hashes are verified before and after execution
BUILD and CALIBRATION labels are inaccessible until each public-only bounded causal state is frozen
reader candidates are fitted on four BUILD keys and selected on two disjoint CALIBRATION keys only
the exact logit-scale zero fallback is present and wins deterministic ties
a shuffled-key reader is fitted and frozen through the identical lifecycle
the reader artifact set is persisted before the first sealed-target entropy call
the complete sealed prediction set is persisted before any broker reveal
assumption-swap scores negate and probabilities complement exactly
output-bit-flip, wrong-nonce and output-byte-rotate controls run only after positive CALIBRATION compression
no target key or internal-round state enters the sensor or reader before reveal
no sibling reads or writes and no MPS or GPU calls
hypothesis: A reader fitted only after bounded public-CNF paired-causal states have frozen on four deterministic full-256 BUILD keys, and selected only on two disjoint deterministic CALIBRATION keys, can orient coordinate-bound unary, ARX-neighbor and causal-motif evidence before any fresh target entropy and transfer that orientation to two broker-sealed standard twenty-round ChaCha20 targets with all 256 key bits unknown.
next_action: If sealed compression is positive, preserve this reader freeze and replicate it on a larger never-before-seen sealed panel; otherwise retain the arm-level and control breadcrumbs, expand the public causal feature family or BUILD/CALIBRATION corpus under O1C-0014, and keep the all-256-bit standard output-only attacker contract unchanged.
prediction: Every public target will execute the same 512 paired key-assumption branches and serialize the same 17,408-byte causal-state contract; one of six predeclared feature arms, ridge regularizers, temperatures and shrinkages including an exact zero-information fallback will be frozen from BUILD/CALIBRATION only; all sealed scores and controls will persist before any reveal; the run will report full-key NLL, compression from the exact 256-bit baseline, bit accuracy, byte and 16-bit-block accuracy, exact verification and rank among one million decoys without requiring a positive cryptanalytic result for lifecycle success.
